chapter_title.en: Chapter 56 – The supplication for the illnesses and diseases

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/433)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/433)
text: أُعِيذُكَ بِاللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ عِرْقٍ نَفَّارٍ وَ مِنْ شَرِّ حَرِّ النَّارِ سَبْعَ مَرَّاتٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ibn Abu Najran, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Hareyz, from Zurara,
(It has been narrated) from one of the two (5<sup>th</sup> or 6<sup>th</sup> imam<sup>asws</sup>) having said: ‘Whenever you go over to a sick person, so say,
‘I seek Refuge with Allahazwj the Magnificent, Lordazwj of the Throne, from the evil of every swollen vein, and from the evil of the heat of the Fire’, seven times’.
en.sarwar: 12. Muhammad ibn Yahya from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from ibn abu Najran from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Hariz from Zurara from one of the two Imams (a.s.) who has said the following: “When you visit a patient say, ‘I seek protection for you from Allah, the Great Lord of the great Throne against the evil of every swelling vein and the evil of the heat of fire,’ seven times.’”
